prompt: Write a welcome email for 'InviteJoy' — a digital invitation platform where users can create beautiful online invitations for weddings, birthdays, baby showers, and other celebrations. The platform offers free templates and premium templates. Users sign up, pick a template, customize it, and share a link with guests. Target audience is anyone planning an event — primarily women 25-45, tech-comfortable but not technical, who want something prettier than a WhatsApp message but easier than printed invitations. The welcome email should make them excited to create their first invitation and guide them to browse templates. Tone: warm, celebratory, helpful. Global audience.

assertions.text: Has subject line and preview text
Creates a warm, celebratory welcome feeling
Guides user to browse templates or create first invitation as primary CTA
Mentions both free and premium template options
Global audience safe — no region-specific idioms or cultural assumptions
